name: OneMoreTaskTracker
description: Sidecar for DESIGN.md — carries the token classes Stitch's 8-prop component schema can't express: motion, breakpoints, focus rings, glass effects, full component HTML/CSS snippets.

rules: Animate transform and opacity only — never width/height/top/left.
Pulse and highlight capped at 280ms, animating background-color and opacity only.
All motion collapses to instant under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.

breakpoints.notes: The Gantt is honest about being wider than the viewport. Below 1280px it shows a `narrowViewport.notice` callout instead of squashing into a card. Trackbar + arrow-key panning + Cmd/Ctrl+G are the navigation surface.

focus.notes: Focus is always visible. Buttons take a 2px ring at 2px offset; inline-edit cells take a 1px ring with no offset so the cell stays flush with its row.

i18n.notes: Russian is the primary script. Every face below the body line ships first-class Cyrillic. Geologica's condensed wdth 78 axis is what keeps the 280px Plan-view gutter readable for Russian compounds; never replace it without checking widths in both languages.

notes: Every state-palette hue is paired with an icon or position so the palette survives color-vision deficiencies.
All toggles use aria-pressed; all live regions use aria-live with an explicit politeness level.
Focus must be visible — never `outline: none` without a replacement ring.

button-primary.css: .btn--primary { background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-ink); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.65rem 1.3rem; min-height: 44px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: background-color var(--transition-fast); } .btn--primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .btn--primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

button-ghost.css: .btn--ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--text); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem; transition: background var(--transition-fast); } .btn--ghost:hover { background: var(--accent-dim); }

callout.html:
!
Sample warning copy.
callout.css: .callout { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: flex-start; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); } .callout--warning { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--warning) 12%, var(--surface)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--warning) 30%, var(--border)); }
rules: Never use a side-stripe border. Full border or background tint only.
Tint background with color-mix(in oklch, <tone> 12%, var(--surface)) so the surface stays warm.

status-dot.css: .status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; display: inline-block; } .status-dot--blocked { background: var(--accent); } .status-dot--clear { background: var(--success); } .status-dot--failed { background: var(--danger); }
rules: Always paired with a 16px integration logo so color is reinforcement, not the only signal.

gantt-feature-row.structure: Sticky 280px gutter (lead avatar + title + mini-team + due chip) + horizontally-scrolling segmented bar of 5 stage segments. Row height is a multiple of 8px (default 48px); expanded sub-rows use 40px.
rules: position: sticky on the gutter is load-bearing — never break it.
Bar segments use the state palette; status icon overlays current/overdue/completed/upcoming/notPlanned.
Inline-first, never modal. Two variants: row (head of gantt-page__lanes) and standalone (empty state).
After successful submit, focus stays in the input and the row pulses background-color for 280ms — rapid-add support.
Esc with a draft clears the draft; Esc with an empty draft collapses to ghost.

antiPatterns: glassmorphism on cards (backdrop-filter: blur on .card surfaces)
hero-metric template (big number + tiny label + delta arrow + sparkline)
identical card grids (same-sized icon+heading+text cards repeated)
modal as first answer to a create/edit task
Jira blue / Trello pastel / MS Project gridline gloom

/layout: per-component CSS, z-index tokens, rare tokens.css
/shape: new component CSS files; append-only on page CSS

tokens.mergeSafety: .gitattributes sets *.css merge=union as a fallback. Same-file edits should still be the exception, not the rule.

registers.rationale: App UI / control room — design serves the product. Brand register would apply to a marketing or landing surface, which this project does not have.
